main.name: Ms. Bumbleflower
main.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever you cast a spell, target opponent draws a card. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying until end of turn. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, you draw two cards.

card.name: Questing Phelddagrif
card.oracle_text:
{G}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Target opponent creates a 1/1 green Hippo creature token.
{W}: This creature gains protection from black and from red until end of turn. Target opponent gains 2 life.
{U}: This creature gains flying until end of turn. Target opponent may draw a card.

card.name: Swan Song
card.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text: The gracefulness of their flight makes one wonder whether Nature or, indeed, a rare sort of Magic lifts their wings.

card.name: Eureka
card.oracle_text: Starting with you, each player may put a permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield. Repeat this process until no one puts a card onto the battlefield.

card.name: Forbidden Orchard
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
Whenever you tap this land for mana, target opponent creates a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token.

card.name: Heartbeat of Spring
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, that player adds one mana of any type that land produced.
card.flavor_text:
"It is true that we monks hold the key to paradise, but most don't understand that the paradise we guard is the one within."
—Diary of Azusa

card.name: Font of Mythos
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws two additional cards.
card.flavor_text: Those who drink from Malfegor's cup are tainted with hunger and stained with lies.

card.name: Propaganda
card.oracle_text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you.
card.flavor_text:
"The cost of your opposition will be extracted from your wits."
—Nekusar, the Mindrazer

card.name: Sea of Clouds
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
card.flavor_text: Skybridges from across Kylem converge at the grand stadium of Valor's Reach.

card.name: Arid Mesa
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Leyline of Anticipation
card.oracle_text:
If this card is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield.
You may cast spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Temple Bell
card.oracle_text: {T}: Each player draws a card.
card.flavor_text: Enlightenment is not gained by striking the bell or hearing its toll. It's found in the silence that follows.

card.name: Howling Mine
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, if this artifact is untapped, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text: Legend has it that the mine howls out the last words of those who died inside.

card.name: Bronze Bombshell
card.oracle_text: When a player other than this creature's owner controls it, that player sacrifices it. If the player does, this creature deals 7 damage to the player.
card.flavor_text:
"Ooh, shiny! Let's pull off the chain and take her with us."
—Ukl, Gruul raider, last words

card.name: Generous Gift
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Elephant creature token.
card.flavor_text: The best presents are impossible to regift.

card.name: Prismatic Vista
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: There is beauty in the uncertainty of potential.

card.name: Dictate of Kruphix
card.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text: "Knowledge is cruel. It will break your heart and test your allegiances. Are you certain you want this curse?"

card.name: Kami of the Crescent Moon
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text:
"He's a lot like me, that masterless little kami . . . unimpressed by grandeur and never at a loss for a trick."
—Toshiro Umezawa

card.name: Mikokoro, Center of the Sea
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Each player draws a card.
card.flavor_text:
"Center of the Sea, Eye of the World, Shrine of Enlightenment. Seek it for answers. Seek it for healing. Seek it and return transformed."
—Scroll fragment from the ruins of Minamo

card.name: Steel Golem
card.oracle_text: You can't cast creature spells.
card.flavor_text:
"Although I would give my life to protect Gerrard, my conscience will not let me take another's. There are many who would not hesitate."
—Karn, silver golem

card.name: Noble Hierarch
card.oracle_text:
Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
{T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.
card.flavor_text: In all her years of vigil, her resolve has never faltered.

card.name: Well of Ideas
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, draw two cards.
At the beginning of each other player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
At the beginning of your draw step, draw two additional cards.

card.name: Wheel and Deal
card.oracle_text:
Any number of target opponents each discard their hands, then draw seven cards.
Draw a card.

card.name: Wheel and Deal
card.oracle_text:
Any number of target opponents each discard their hands, then draw seven cards.
Draw a card.

card.name: Flooded Strand
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once slept, their bones now rest.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once roared, their bones now keen.

card.name: Eladamri's Call
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a creature card, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Tribal rivalries and petty disputes were laid aside at Eladamri's summons.

card.name: Rainbow Vale
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. An opponent gains control of this land at the beginning of the next end step.
card.flavor_text: In the feudal days of Icatia, finding the Rainbow Vale was often the goal of Knights' quests.

card.name: Rejuvenating Springs
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Wrong Turn
card.oracle_text: Target opponent gains control of target creature. (If an attacking or blocking creature changes controllers, it's removed from combat.)
card.flavor_text: Its bewildered bellow was met with a stern "shh."

card.name: Flumph
card.oracle_text:
Defender, flying
Whenever this creature is dealt damage, you and target opponent each draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Flumphs siphon thoughts and energy from evil aberrations, and are often eager to share the dark knowledge they obtain with friendly adventurers.

card.name: Wedding Ring
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, if it was cast, target opponent creates a token that's a copy of it.
Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring draws a card during their turn, you draw a card.
Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring gains life during their turn, you gain that much life.

card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Spara's Headquarters
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
card.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell. Its controller creates two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
card.flavor_text: Elspeth wanted answers. Xander needed a spy. Their paths were destined to cross.

card.name: Mana Confluence
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Better places poured prismatic dreams into the world, rendering it anew.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Gluntch, the Bestower
card.oracle_text:
Flying
At the beginning of your end step, choose a player. They put two +1/+1 counters on a creature they control. Choose a second player to draw a card. Then choose a third player to create two Treasure tokens.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Archivist of Oghma
card.oracle_text:
Flash
Whenever an opponent searches their library, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "Knowledge is the greatest tool of the mortal mind, outweighing anything made by mortal hands. Before anything else can exist, the idea must exist."

card.name: Consecrated Sphinx
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever an opponent draws a card, you may draw two cards.
card.flavor_text: Blessed by the lands of winter.

card.name: Force of Will
card.oracle_text:
You may pay 1 life and exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Counter target spell.
card.flavor_text: "Weren't you ever taught that it's rude to interrupt?"

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

card.name: Birds of Paradise
card.oracle_text:
Flying
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Its brilliant plumage painted streaks of color across a sky long darkened by war.

card.name: Enlightened Tutor
card.oracle_text: Search your library for an artifact or enchantment card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
card.flavor_text: Wisdom is a precious heirloom to be passed down faithfully from each generation to the next.

card.name: Maze of Ith
card.oracle_text: {T}: Untap target attacking creature. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to and dealt by that creature this turn.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the interlopers scurry like trapped rats until they exhaust themselves. They are no threat to us."
—Ith, High Arcanist

card.set_name: Phyrexia: All Will Be One Commander
card.name: Beast Within
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
card.flavor_text:
"Kill the weak so they can't drag the strong down to their level. This is true compassion."
—Benzir, archdruid of Temple Might

card.name: Field of Ruin
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. Each player searches their library for a basic land card, puts it onto the battlefield, then shuffles.
card.flavor_text:
"There's some devilry at work in the Shire."
—Sam

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Alms Collector
card.oracle_text:
Flash
If an opponent would draw two or more cards, instead you and that player each draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "There is no justice when some profit and others go without."

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

card.name: Land Tax
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls more lands than you, you may search your library for up to three basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"'That town is rudely blocking my view!' said the witch. The giant bowed and smiled."
—*The Goose Mother and Other Tales*

card.name: Forced Fruition
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, that player draws seven cards.
card.flavor_text:
"'My kingdom for a feast!' quoth the king. A faerie appeared before him, and spoke through a wicked grin: 'As you wish.'"
—*Tales of the Fae*

card.name: Sylvan Tutor
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
card.flavor_text:
"That was a mighty shot in the dark, my friend!" said Gimli.
"But who can say what it hit?" said Legolas.

card.name: Fractured Identity
card.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent. Each player other than its controller creates a token that's a copy of it.
card.flavor_text:
"It's like I'm breaking into a million pieces and there's only one thing I remember. I have to save the Doctor."
—Clara Oswald

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Alchemist's Refuge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{G}{U}, {T}: You may cast spells this turn as though they had flash.
card.flavor_text: Persecuted alchemists fled deep into Kessig's wilds, seeking solitude to continue their ghoulish craft.

card.name: Copy Enchantment
card.oracle_text: You may have this enchantment enter as a copy of any enchantment on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Simic mages create redundant backups of their experiments to reduce the consequences of catastrophe.

card.name: Hedge Maze
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Lush Portico
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Trouble in Pairs
card.oracle_text:
If an opponent would begin an extra turn, that player skips that turn instead.
Whenever an opponent attacks you with two or more creatures, draws their second card each turn, or casts their second spell each turn, you draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Together, they're greater than the sum of their rap sheets.

card.name: Path to Exile
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: In the end, he marched into the desert sands, leaving the Vault behind him.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: "Tulips bring love into the world. I bring the tulips."

card.name: Windfall
card.oracle_text: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way.
card.flavor_text: "Rich" is a relative term.

card.name: Strix Serenade
card.oracle_text: Counter target artifact, creature, or planeswalker spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text: Some birds sing to nature's beauty and the freedom of the skies. Others simply ask questions.

card.name: Arcane Denial
card.oracle_text:
Counter target spell. Its controller may draw up to two cards at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
You draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

card.name: Pongify
card.oracle_text: Destroy target creature. It can't be regenerated. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Ape creature token.
card.flavor_text: Some spellcrafting mistakes go on to become spells of their own.

card.name: Sokrates, Athenian Teacher
card.oracle_text:
Defender
Sokrates has hexproof as long as it's untapped.
Sokratic Dialogue — {T}: Until end of turn, target creature gains "If this creature would deal combat damage to a player, prevent that damage. This creature's controller and that player each draw half that many cards, rounded down."

card.name: Wear Down
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Destroy target artifact or enchantment. If the gift was promised, instead destroy two target artifacts and/or enchantments.
card.flavor_text: The birdfolk guards flitted angrily. "Seriously, Timbles? Again?!"

card.name: Peerless Recycling
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If the gift was promised, instead return two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Dawn's Truce
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
You and permanents you control gain hexproof until end of turn. If the gift was promised, permanents you control also gain indestructible until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "I have a child I want to return to as well," whispered Mabel.

card.name: Dewdrop Cure
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Return up to two target creature cards each with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If the gift was promised, instead return up to three target creature cards each with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Starfall Invocation
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Destroy all creatures. If the gift was promised, return a creature card put into your graveyard this way to the battlefield under your control.
card.flavor_text: The boundaries of Valley are heavily defended. Especially at night.

card.name: Long River's Pull
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Counter target creature spell. If the gift was promised, instead counter target spell.

card.name: Scrapshooter
card.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.)
Reach
When this creature enters, if the gift was promised, destroy target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls.

card.name: Octomancer
card.oracle_text:
Gift an Octopus (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they create an 8/8 blue Octopus creature token.)
At the beginning of each end step, create a token that's a copy of target creature token that entered the battlefield this turn.

card.name: Tempt with Bunnies
card.oracle_text: Tempting Offer — Draw a card and create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token. Then each opponent may draw a card and create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token. For each opponent who does, you draw a card and you create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token.

card.name: Jolly Gerbils
card.oracle_text: Whenever you give a gift, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "With all the chaos going around, we thought it might be the perfect time to take a break and have a nice picnic. Would you like to join us?"

card.name: Rites of Flourishing
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
Each player may play an additional land on each of their turns.
card.flavor_text: To practice synergy, many frogfolk elementalists find joy in cleansing rivers and ponds together.

card.name: Perch Protection
card.oracle_text:
Gift an extra turn (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they take an extra turn after this one.)
Create four 2/2 blue Bird creature tokens with flying. If the gift was promised, all permanents you control phase out, and until your next turn, your life total can't change and you gain protection from everything.
Exile Perch Protection.

card.name: Loran of the Third Path
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
When Loran enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.
{T}: You and target opponent each draw a card.
card.flavor_text: As a scholar, she saw the sylex not as a weapon, but as a key to the past.

card.name: Kwain, Itinerant Meddler
card.oracle_text: {T}: Each player may draw a card, then each player who drew a card this way gains 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "Why so slow, why so slow? Hurry up! You never know what you'll find."

card.name: Tenuous Truce
card.oracle_text:
Enchant opponent
At the beginning of enchanted opponent's end step, you and that player each draw a card.
When you attack enchanted opponent or a planeswalker they control or when they attack you or a planeswalker you control, sacrifice this Aura.

card.name: Scrawling Crawler
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws a card.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player loses 1 life.
card.flavor_text: It spreads the machine gospel of New Phyrexia, its task incomplete until all surrender to perfection.

card.name: Stiltzkin, Moogle Merchant
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
{2}, {T}: Target opponent gains control of another target permanent you control. If they do, you draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "How about a three-piece combo of Hi-Potion, Ether, and Phoenix Pinion for 444 Gil?"

card.name: Auroral Procession
card.oracle_text: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: The Temur celebrate the end of the Unbroken Night with stories, dances, and feasts. They gather to witness the first light of dawn as the land sings in harmony.

card.name: Tataru Taru
card.oracle_text:
When Tataru Taru enters, you draw a card and target opponent may draw a card.
Scions' Secretary — Whenever an opponent draws a card, if it isn't that player's turn, create a tapped Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Skyshroud Claim
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Flowstone spreads, but new life spreads faster."

card.name: Minds Aglow
card.oracle_text: Join forces — Starting with you, each player may pay any amount of mana. Each player draws X cards, where X is the total amount of mana paid this way.

card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever you cast a spell, target opponent draws a card. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying until end of turn. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, you draw two cards.

tokens.name: Tome of the Infinite
tokens.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Conjure a random card from Tome of the Infinite's spellbook into your hand. It perpetually gains "You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast this spell."

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

tokens.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, if it was cast, target opponent creates a token that's a copy of it.
Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring draws a card during their turn, you draw a card.
Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring gains life during their turn, you gain that much life.
